Tekno Phantom Agent - Run Commands (Windows / PowerShell)
=========================================================

Current local setup in this repo:
- Brain:   http://127.0.0.1:8090
- Backend: http://127.0.0.1:8081
- Frontend http://localhost:3000
- Model:   Ollama (qwen2.5:3b)

IMPORTANT
- Keep each service in its own terminal window.
- Start in this order: Ollama -> Brain -> Backend -> Frontend.
- For Playwright mode on Windows, run backend WITHOUT --reload.


1) Terminal A - Ollama check/start
----------------------------------
# If Ollama app/service is already running, this is enough:
ollama list

# If needed, pull model once:
ollama pull qwen2.5:3b

# Optional manual serve (usually not required on Windows app install):
# ollama serve


2) Terminal B - Brain service (port 8090)
------------------------------------------
cd "C:\Users\Teknotrait Solutions\Desktop\Tekno-Phatom-agent\brain"
.\.venv\Scripts\python.exe -m uvicorn app.main:app --host 127.0.0.1 --port 8090


3) Terminal C - Backend service (port 8081)
--------------------------------------------
cd "C:\Users\Teknotrait Solutions\Desktop\Tekno-Phatom-agent\backend"
.\.venv\Scripts\python.exe -m uvicorn app.main:app --host 127.0.0.1 --port 8081

# Optional: enable real File MCP integration (recommended for requirement coverage)
# set FILESYSTEM_MODE=mcp
# then start backend in the same terminal


4) Terminal D - Frontend (port 3000)
-------------------------------------
cd "C:\Users\Teknotrait Solutions\Desktop\Tekno-Phatom-agent\frontend"
npm.cmd run dev

Open in browser:
http://localhost:3000


5) Health checks (from any PowerShell terminal)
------------------------------------------------
Invoke-RestMethod http://127.0.0.1:8090/health
Invoke-RestMethod http://127.0.0.1:8081/health
Invoke-RestMethod http://127.0.0.1:8081/api/config

Expected:
- brain: status=ok, mode=local, model=qwen2.5:3b
- backend: status=ok, llm_mode=local, model=qwen2.5:3b, browser_mode=playwright

# Optional strict Browser MCP mode:
# BROWSER_MODE=mcp
# BROWSER_MCP_COMMAND=npx
# BROWSER_MCP_PACKAGE=@playwright/mcp@latest


6) If frontend shows "Failed to fetch"
---------------------------------------
Check this file:
frontend\.env.local

It must contain:
NEXT_PUBLIC_API_BASE_URL=http://127.0.0.1:8081

After changing .env.local, restart frontend terminal (npm.cmd run dev).


7) Stop services
----------------
- In each running terminal, press: Ctrl + C


8) One-time install commands (if new machine or fresh venv)
------------------------------------------------------------
# brain
cd "C:\Users\Teknotrait Solutions\Desktop\Tekno-Phatom-agent\brain"
python -m venv .venv
.\.venv\Scripts\python.exe -m pip install -e .

# backend
cd "C:\Users\Teknotrait Solutions\Desktop\Tekno-Phatom-agent\backend"
python -m venv .venv
.\.venv\Scripts\python.exe -m pip install -e .
.\.venv\Scripts\python.exe -m playwright install chromium

# frontend
cd "C:\Users\Teknotrait Solutions\Desktop\Tekno-Phatom-agent\frontend"
npm.cmd install


9) Notes
--------
- backend uses SQLite persistence now:
  RUN_STORE_BACKEND=sqlite
  RUN_STORE_DB_PATH=data/run_store.sqlite3
- backend supports File MCP mode:
  FILESYSTEM_MODE=mcp
  FILE_MCP_COMMAND=npx
  FILE_MCP_PACKAGE=@modelcontextprotocol/server-filesystem
- optional admin token protection:
  ADMIN_API_TOKEN=your_secret_token
  frontend\.env.local -> NEXT_PUBLIC_ADMIN_API_TOKEN=your_secret_token
- If you change backend port later, update frontend\.env.local accordingly.


10) Automated regression tests (backend)
----------------------------------------
cd "C:\Users\Teknotrait Solutions\Desktop\Tekno-Phatom-agent\backend"
.\.venv\Scripts\python.exe -m pip install -e .[dev]
.\.venv\Scripts\python.exe -m pytest -q

Expected:
- All backend tests pass.
- Includes step-matrix integration test:
  navigate, wait, type, select, scroll, handle_popup, verify_text, verify_image, click
- Includes selenium-style smoke flow test.
